---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a parser, renderer, or intelligence feature for marco-core
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: Ranrar

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation. E.g. "marco-core does not support [...]".

**Describe the feature**
What you would like `marco-core` to support — a new Markdown construct, a new render option, a new intelligence capability, an API change, etc.

**Spec or reference**
If applicable, link to the relevant spec section (CommonMark, GFM) or to prior art in another Markdown library.

**Proposed API (optional)**
If you have an idea for how the public API should look:

```rust
// e.g. new RenderOptions field, new function, new NodeKind variant, ...
```

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches you've considered and why they don't fit.

**Additional context**
Anything else relevant — sample input, expected output, downstream use case in an editor.
